title: Deduplicate readJson, fix test/lint config, clean up generate
description:
Four code quality items from the audit:

1. **Deduplicate readJson** — records.ts has a private readJson that is identical to store.ts's exported readJsonFile. records.ts should import from store.ts.

2. **Test/lint config gaps** — tsconfig.json and biome.json only include src/**/*.ts. Test files are not typechecked or linted. Add test/**/*.ts to both.

3. **Duplicate import** — skeleton.test.ts imports loadClaims twice (lines 16 and 22). Remove the duplicate.

4. **loadIssuesLite** — generate.ts has an untyped JSON parse that silently skips errors. Use the typed loadIssues from store.ts instead.
acceptance: records.ts imports readJsonFile from store.ts instead of defining its own readJson.
skeleton.test.ts has no duplicate loadClaims import.
generate.ts uses loadIssues from store.ts instead of loadIssuesLite.
All tests pass, typecheck clean, biome clean.
